client: Convenium (flagship demo) — THE MERIDIAN, fictional $12.5M penthouse, floor 60, anonymous city
name: THE MERIDIAN
oneLiner: Sixty floors above everything — one residence, a private elevator, and an infinity pool holding the skyline still.
audience: real: prospects receiving Convenium outreach; fictional: UHNW buyer deciding in one visit
differentiator: fictional property = zero usage restrictions, publishable, video generated ONCE and reskinned per pitch via skin.ts
mood: a nocturne about altitude — weightless, expensive silence at dusk; editorial, never brochure

voice.tone: still, assured, second person; short declarative lines; the city is scenery, the silence is the product

tokens.texture: soft grain + slow drifting light shaft
tokens.accentRule: single accent (no seasonal pair on this skin — ONE-accent law intact): HUD readouts, kickers, price, CTA only. Ink + champagne per pack prompt 06, trend-tuned like 003

photos: assets-in/ — 5 AI keyframes K0–K4 + 4 chained clips J1–J4 (lab/004-MERIDIAN-MEDIA-GUIDE.md); fictional, publishable, no licensing constraints
referenceSites: https://sondaven.com/en (chapter walk, huge quiet type, hold-and-move gallery)

upsellNotes: This skin IS the outreach asset: per-prospect emails reskin name/copy/facts in skin.ts; clips reused. 004 is a SKIN of the 003 template — uniqueness law deliberately not applied between skins of the same template.
